description: Represents one directory context that an operator can switch to, including the role assigned for that directory.

directory_uid.description: Unique identifier of the directory context assigned to the operator (e.g., "dir_abc123").

directory_name.description: Display name of the directory context assigned to the operator (e.g., "Example Directory").

role.description: Operator role assigned for this directory context (e.g., "admin", "sales").

current.description: Indicates whether this assignment is the operator's current active directory context (e.g., true).
